steps.title: Check current cri-o deployment
steps.description:
Verify your cri-o version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o
helm list -n cri-o 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working cri-o installation.

steps.title: Review cri-o configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant cri-o configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o
kubectl get configmap -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cri-o
```
we should support a static build for CRI-O so that we don't need to carry dependencies and make it easier to copy the crio binary.

More information here: https://github.com/rootless-containers/usernetes/issues/19

steps.title: Apply the fix for crio static build
steps.description:
I played around with static cri-o builds and setup a Nix package which produces a 50Mb binary.
https://gist.github.com/saschagrunert/d043c2c8615700b5dae64e967183cc58

Some characteristics:
- go version go1.12 linux/amd64
- binary:
    ```
    > file result-bin/bin/crio
    result-bin/bin/crio: ELF
```yaml
> file result-bin/bin/crio
    result-bin/bin/crio: ELF 64-bit LSB executable, x86-64, version 1 (GNU/Linux), statically linked, for GNU/Linux 2.6.32, Go BuildID=wcs6RAOx63B7GLR4ISa6/SuuQZddzDCSqNV1oOKoq/MyRYBEPOHuJdF17Tdc20/JVnN3XJcTYuu_823iLMg, stripped
```

steps.title: Upgrade cri-o to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade cri-o:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade cri-o cri-o/cri-o --namespace cri-o
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cri-o
helm list -n cri-o
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o
kubectl get events -n cri-o --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "crio static build" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: I played around with static cri-o builds and setup a Nix package which produces a 50Mb binary.
codeSnippets:
> file result-bin/bin/crio
    result-bin/bin/crio: ELF 64-bit LSB executable, x86-64, version 1 (GNU/Linux), statically linked, for GNU/Linux 2.6.32, Go BuildID=wcs6RAOx63B7GLR4ISa6/SuuQZddzDCSqNV1oOKoq/MyRYBEPOHuJdF17Tdc20/JVnN3XJcTYuu_823iLMg, stripped

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with cri-o installed or the issue environment reproducible.
